cases.question: I already have app tool functions and a provider call. Wrap them with NeMo Relay without changing their business logic.
cases.ground_truth: Use the instrumentation skill to choose a scope boundary, wrap existing tool and LLM calls with managed execution APIs, preserve caller-visible results, and attach metadata where useful.
expected_behavior: Choose a natural agent, request, workflow, or graph scope boundary
Use managed execution APIs before manual lifecycle APIs
Preserve the original callable arguments and results
Handle metadata and context propagation when needed

cases.question: My calls are already wrapped; now export traces to OpenTelemetry.
cases.ground_truth: Export setup after instrumentation belongs to nemo-relay-export-otel.
